title: 24 HOUR CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: PENDLETON ADVOCACY CENTER 24 HOUR CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line for domestic violence, dating violence, stalking, and sexual assault. Services include safety planning, confidential abuse assessments, and advocacy. 1103 SE Court Place Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 833-1161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 833-1161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Dating Abuse Hotlines Domestic Violence Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLASSES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - TRAINING WORKSHOPS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADVOCACY SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PENDLETON ADVOCACY CENTER
